title: Growth Non-VR
description: A non-VR version of the original Growth modpack
body:
# Growth non-VR

This version of Growth is made for non-VR users, while still keeping it immersive, adventurous and being lightweight.
The world is carefully crafted to feel like its actually alive, villagers smooth out their paths, flowers regrow and everything is made to feel like an actual real world.


## How do I play this in VR?

You can download the VR version here!  
https://modrinth.com/modpack/growth-vr
